consumer_electronics.title: I finally get the iPhone Air

channel_news.title: Retailers are bringing AI into stores in more ways
channel_news.summary: The application of artificial intelligence as a customer-facing element of physical stores is far from one-size-fits-all. AI use cases for in-store shopping, in discovery, research and checkout, still vary as brands are trying to figure out what consumers want from AI.

channel_news.title: The Unilever-McCormick deal ushers in a new era for condiments
channel_news.summary: The merger between McCormick and the food division of Unilever highlights the never-ending demand for condiments and spices among Americans. Despite consolidation, the category is expected to continue seeing innovation from the food startup and private label players.

channel_news.title: Modern Retail Podcast: Why shoppers can’t get enough of limited-edition scents and flavors
channel_news.summary: CPG brands are increasingly using limited-edition flavors and scents (LTOs) to drive sales and attract new customers. On this week's episode of the Modern Retail Podcast, Dude Wipes talks about how seasonal LTOs have become a big sales driver for them.

channel_news.title: In 2026, AI talk at retail events shifts to proving real results, defining a true strategy
channel_news.summary: At this year's Shoptalk Spring, it wasn't enough for brands and retailers to talk about the ways that they think they will use AI. Now, the pressure is on for everyone to prove how they are using AI to increase output and drive sales.

channel_news.title: Amazon to issue 3.5% surcharge on fulfillment services as fuel, logistics costs rise
